cases.name: unwind integer array and return elements
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x RETURN x

cases.name: unwind with distinct removes duplicates
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3, 1, 2] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x RETURN DISTINCT x

cases.name: unwind with count aggregation
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x RETURN count(x)

cases.name: unwind with where filter
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x WITH x WHERE x > 1 RETURN x

cases.name: unwind target cannot shadow source name
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS x UNWIND x AS x RETURN x

cases.name: unwind collected node names and return them
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.tag = 'unwind_test' WITH collect(n.name) AS names UNWIND names AS name RETURN name

cases.name: unwind collected names then match against another kind
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.tag = 'unwind_xk' WITH collect(n.name) AS names UNWIND names AS name MATCH (m:NodeKind2) WHERE m.name = name RETURN m

cases.name: unwind labels and aggregate by string kind
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE n.environmentid = '1234' UNWIND labels(n) AS kind RETURN kind, count(n) AS count

cases.name: unwind labels and aggregate all nodes by return alias
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) UNWIND labels(n) AS label RETURN label, count(n) AS count

cases.name: unwind labels and order aggregate count by alias
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) UNWIND labels(n) AS label RETURN label, count(n) AS count ORDER BY count DESC

cases.name: unwind labels and order label by return alias
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) UNWIND labels(n) AS label RETURN label, count(n) AS count ORDER BY label

cases.name: unwind labels and order explicit label alias
cases.cypher: MATCH (n) UNWIND labels(n) AS label RETURN label AS kind, count(n) AS count ORDER BY kind

cases.name: unwind concatenated collected names from two matches
cases.cypher: MATCH (au:AZUser) WHERE au.name CONTAINS 'ADMIN' MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.name CONTAINS 'ADMIN' WITH collect(u.name) + collect(au.azname) AS temp UNWIND temp AS usernames RETURN usernames

cases.name: unwind collected names concatenated with a literal array
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WITH collect(n.name) + ['tail'] AS names UNWIND names AS name RETURN name
